learn.core_idea: Sleep blocks execution until a deterministic wake tick, modeling timed waiting behavior.
mechanism_steps: Sleep syscall records wake target tick.
Wake event returns process to ready/running.
learn.worked_example: A sleep-then-compute program resumes exactly after configured delay.
common_mistakes: Assuming sleep consumes CPU ticks for the process.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can identify sys.sleep and proc.wakeup.
I can verify completion after wakeup.
